title: Tender American Black Bean Skewers
description: Salty and comforting American dish featuring fermented black beans, perfect for a cozy dinner, made kosher-friendly and cooked to perfection on a robata-grill.
instructions: Preheat the robata-grill to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, kosher salt, brown sugar, smoked paprika, garlic powder, and onion powder.
Add the fermented black beans to the bowl and toss to coat evenly with the marinade.
Thread 2-3 black beans onto each wooden skewer, leaving a small space between each bean.
Place the skewers on the robata-grill and cook for 10-12 minutes, or until the beans are tender and lightly charred.
Remove the skewers from the grill and sprinkle with chopped fresh parsley.
Serve the skewers hot, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
Let the skewers cool for a few minutes before serving.
